ORDER AND STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEM, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES. THE COURT EXECUTED THE PARTIES' STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT, AND SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER ATTACHED THERETO. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE AN ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEM, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Off calendar at the request of the parties. The Court executed the parties' Stipulation to Set Aside Entry of Defendant's Default, and signed the proposed Order attached thereto. Defendant shall file an answer within 10 days from the notice of entry of the Order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
